description: CompositionPure leatherette shoulder bag in black with broad and soft shoulder straps, side straps, three separate chambers and dedicated zipperBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleanerThis stylish bag is for the woman with a strong sense of style. Apt for a visit to the club, a party with friends, casual date or simply on a chilled-out shopping spree, this fashionable shoulder bag is oh-so-perfect for all ages and dresses! Stack all your essentials into it comfortably. With its superior finished look, it&rsquo s definitely a head turner.
